motivation: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
Push yourself because no one else will do it for you.
Small steps every day lead to big results.
love: Love is not what you say, love is what you do.
Where there is love, there is life.
success: Success is not final, failure is not fatal.
Dream big and dare to fail.
Work hard in silence, let success make the noise.
humor: I'm not lazy, I'm on energy-saving mode.
Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
I told my computer I needed a break, and it said no problem — it froze.
